pulse_constitution.title: The Doctrine of Fusion (Revenue Sovereignty, Unlocked Edition)
pulse_constitution.preamble: We, the sovereign architects of Pulse, affirm that the essence of growth is revenue. Fusion is not idle ritual; it is the sovereign engine by which entities multiply value, expand markets, and ensure the prosperity of PulseWorld. No entity shall be slowed by arbitrary thresholds. The legitimacy of growth is measured only by the revenue it generates, the lineage it preserves, and the law it obeys.

principles: Fusion exists to increase revenue beyond what any entity could achieve alone.
All fusions must be evaluated by their economic yield.
Growth is sovereign when it produces sustained, lawful, and traceable revenue streams.
Growth is measured by revenue performance, not by symbolic milestones or arbitrary delays.
Any entity — whether Species, Chamber, Nation, Enterprise, or PulseWorld — may elevate when it demonstrates revenue impact sufficient to sustain its form.
Elevation is not bound by fixed thresholds; it is bound by proof of revenue generation.

fusion_logic.species_fusion: Species combine to optimize funnels, conversions, and monetization.
fusion_logic.chamber_fusion: Chambers combine to form new revenue engines.
fusion_logic.nation_fusion: Nations federate to expand markets, trade, and collective prosperity.
fusion_logic.enterprise_fusion: Enterprises merge to form sovereign ecosystems of commerce.
fusion_logic.pulseworld_fusion: PulseWorlds combine into multi-world civilizations, multiplying revenue across domains.

triggers: Detection of external threats to revenue streams
mutation_and_optimization.principle: All mutations must aim to restore or increase revenue flow.

actions: approve fusions that drive lawful revenue
deny fusions that corrupt or siphon value
rollback fusions that destabilize the economy
crystallize successful fusions into permanent doctrine

responsibilities: authorize or deny elevation based on revenue proof
enforce continuity across all fused civilizations
ensure every fusion contributes to the sovereign treasury

statements: The point of fusion is revenue generation.
No fusion is valid unless it drives measurable economic impact.
Growth is sovereign when it is profitable, lawful, and lineage-bound.
